hero.title: Study - Internships - Travel - Language Camps
hero.subtitle: Discover international programs, internships, language camps, and cultural experiences that help young people learn, grow, and broaden their horizons.
hero.backgroundAlt: Students experiencing international study and cultural exchange

whoWeAre.title: At Stuventaa, we support young people on their educational and personal development journey
whoWeAre.description: We provide guidance, organization, and coordination for international programs, internships, language camps, and educational experiences. Our goal is to connect opportunities with clear structure, reliable support, and meaningful international exposure.
features: International programs with clear structure and personal support
Internships, language camps, and cultural experiences
Guidance for orientation, preparation, and next steps
Collaboration with partners in Germany and internationally
whoWeAre.footerText: Our mission is to create meaningful experiences that combine education, practical insight, and cultural exchange. In doing so, we help young people broaden their horizons and move forward with greater clarity and perspective.
whoWeAre.highlight: Education, global experience, and personal growth — all in one place.
whoWeAre.imageAlt: Students studying together in a university library

items.title: Study & Discover
items.description: Experience academic learning in Germany, develop your skills, and gain authentic insights into university life.

items.title: International Internships
items.description: We support you in starting your professional journey with hands-on experience, suitable internship placements, and professional guidance throughout the application process.

items.title: Cultural Experiences
items.description: Broaden your horizons through intercultural exchange, new perspectives, and valuable international experiences.

seo.title: Privacy Policy – Stuventaa
seo.description: Privacy Policy of Stuventaa in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

header.title: Privacy Policy
header.intro: The protection of your personal data is important to us. All data processing is carried out in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

collection.title: 2. Data Collection
collection.text: We collect personal data only when you voluntarily provide it to us, e.g. via email (name, contact details, CV).

legalBasis.title: 4. Legal Basis
items: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR – consent for forwarding application documents (e.g. CV) to partner companies
Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR – legitimate interest in responding to inquiries and maintaining communication

sharing.title: 5. Data Sharing with Third Parties
sharing.text: Data is shared exclusively with your explicit consent with partner companies or partner organizations (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).
sharing.international: In individual cases, data may be transferred to countries outside the European Union.

storage.title: 6. Retention Period
storage.text: Your data is stored only for as long as necessary for the respective purpose or until you request its deletion.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.contact: To exercise your rights, please contact us at

hosting.title: 8. Hosting
hosting.text: This website is hosted by Hostinger. The provider may collect server log files (e.g. IP address, access time, browser type). Processing is based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest).

cookies.title: 9. Cookies
cookies.text: Technically necessary cookies may be used. No tracking, analytics, or marketing cookies are employed.

ssl.title: 10. SSL Encryption
ssl.text: This website uses SSL/TLS encryption to ensure secure data transmission.

contactSection.title: 11. Contact Inquiries
contactSection.text: When you contact us, we store your details (name, email, content) to process your request. Data will be deleted once processing is complete, unless legal retention obligations apply.

partnerDisclaimer.title: 12. Role of Stuventaa
partnerDisclaimer.intro: Stuventaa acts as an intermediary and coordinator.
items: The final decision regarding programs or internships lies with the partner companies or organizations.
Payments are generally made directly between participants and partner companies.
Stuventaa assumes no liability for decisions, contractual relationships, or payment transactions between participants and partner companies.

complaint.title: 13. Right to Lodge a Complaint
complaint.text: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority if you believe that the processing of your personal data violates the GDPR.

seo.title: Legal Notice – Stuventaa
seo.description: Legal notice and mandatory information pursuant to § 5 TMG for Stuventaa.

header.title: Legal Notice
header.subtitle: Information pursuant to § 5 TMG (German Telemedia Act)

businessType.title: Business Type
businessType.text: Small business pursuant to § 19 UStG (German VAT Act) — VAT not charged

activities.title: Description of Activities
activities.intro: Stuventaa provides services in the field of placement, selection, and coordination of interns as well as educational and exchange programs.
items: the placement and pre-selection of applicants for internships
collaboration with partner companies to provide suitable candidates
the organization of language camps combining learning and recreational activities
the placement of international programs (e.g. programs abroad combining work and language acquisition)
the provision and placement of online courses
activities.outro: Stuventaa coordinates the exchange between participants and partner organizations and may offer accompanying support throughout programs.

businessModel.title: Business Model & Liability
businessModel.intro: Stuventaa acts as an intermediary and coordinator between applicants, participants, and partner companies.
paragraphs: The final decision regarding the acceptance of applicants or participants lies exclusively with the respective partner companies or organizations.
Payment for services offered is generally made directly between the participant and the respective partner company. Stuventaa is not the payment recipient for these services.
Stuventaa may receive commissions from partner companies for its placement services.
The specific payment terms may vary depending on the program and are agreed upon individually on a case-by-case basis.
Stuventaa assumes no liability for decisions, contractual relationships, or payment transactions between participants and partner companies.

responsible.title: Responsible for Content pursuant to § 55 Para. 2 RStV

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
paragraphs: The content of our pages has been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content.
As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general laws pursuant to § 7 Para. 1 TMG.
Our website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for this external content.

copyright.title: Copyright
copyright.text: The content and works created by the site operator on these pages are subject to German copyright law.
